message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 16:45 and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
